data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of suggesting times based on integrated calendar availability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the functionality that suggests meeting times based on calendar availability. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this specific functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without direct evidence of its implementation, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of time suggestion based on integrated calendar availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
